name: provenance manifest validator confirms cross-cuts to section 2.8 manifest schema for each consumption block
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && printf '{"commit":"abc","standards_state":{},"pr_corpus_state":{},"compliance_state":{}}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-consumption-schema.sh" --manifest .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json --cross-check section-2-8 2>out.txt && grep -q 'cross_check_section_2_8=pass' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
